hero.title:
Your Buddy Connecting
Discord and Antigravity
hero.subtitle: Send a message on Discord → Antigravity codes for you → Results delivered back to Discord

waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist

success.title: You're on the list! 🎉
success.shareText: Just joined the AntiCrow waitlist! AI coding from Discord 🐦‍⬛

waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.title: Remote Control
items.description: Send tasks to AI from your phone via Discord, anywhere, anytime

items.title: Scheduled Tasks
items.description: Automate recurring tasks with cron expressions

items.title: Agent Team Mode
items.description: Multiple AI agents work in parallel for faster results (Pro)

items.title: Auto Accept
items.description: Automatically approves AI actions during remote execution (Pro)

items.title: Memory
items.description: AI remembers past lessons and applies them to future tasks

items.title: Multi-Workspace
items.description: Manage multiple projects with automatic Discord channels

steps.title: Send a message
steps.description: Type your request in Discord — on your phone, tablet, or PC

steps.title: AI executes
steps.description: AntiCrow bridges your request to Antigravity on your PC

steps.title: Get results
steps.description: Results are sent back to Discord with real-time progress updates

items.title: Local Processing
items.description: All processing runs on your PC. No data sent to external servers.

items.title: Encrypted Storage
items.description: Bot Token is encrypted using SecretStorage.

items.title: Access Control
items.description: User ID-based access control for security.

items.title: No Telemetry
items.description: No telemetry or usage statistics collected.

items.question: Can I use it while away?
items.answer: As long as you have access to Discord — anywhere. Your PC just needs to be online.

items.question: Is my Bot Token secure?
items.answer: It's encrypted with SecretStorage. Never stored in plain text in config files.

items.question: Can I manage multiple projects?
items.answer: Discord categories are automatically created, managing each project independently.
